label: Temp terrain props
description: Properties controlling what happens when temporary terrain is removed.

terrainOnRemoved.label: Terrain on removed
terrainOnRemoved.description: TerrainDef that replaces this terrain when it is removed.

destroysFloors.label: Destroys floors
destroysFloors.description: If true, removing this terrain also destroys any constructed floor underneath.

removedByExplosions.label: Removed by explosions
removedByExplosions.description: If true, explosions can remove this temporary terrain.

replaceableByBridge.label: Replaceable by bridge
replaceableByBridge.description: If true, a bridge can be built on top of this temporary terrain, replacing it.
